visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing has improved target coverage but still does not visually match the same-name reference drawing. Dimension placement, title/notes area, and visual balance remain materially different.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The expected front/top/right/isometric views are present and roughly placed in the reference pattern, so the coarse view layout is acceptable for this iteration.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Real DisplayDim coverage improved to final 12/12, but the visible dimension scheme is still not reference-like and contains extra/crowded dimensions.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension text, arrows, and leaders remain crowded around the main long view; diagonal leader geometry crosses the part area and is not clean enough for manufacturing review.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The lower-sheet title/data placement still does not match the compact reference style and remains flagged by structured style checks.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical note content is present, but placement and manufacturing-readiness still do not match the reference drawing closely enough.

findings: Application Drawing Review screenshot confirms a real improvement: post_layout_final target coverage reached 12/12 and all four expected views are visible.
The generated drawing is still not visually acceptable because dimension lanes are crowded and differ from the reference drawing.
Structured status also remains need_review/fail for style, DisplayDim lifecycle, reference_compare_v4, and vision_qc_v6.
entries.required_correction: Keep the successful post_layout_final 12/12 target coverage, but reduce or consolidate the extra visible dimensions and route dimensions into clean reference-like lanes. Title/data and manufacturing notes must be brought closer to the same-name reference before another 006-only locked rerun and Drawing Review UI screenshot check.
